name: sanctify-mcp
description: Sanctify Cartridge — PHP lint and deviation detection tools
author: Jonathan D.A. Jewell <j.d.a.jewell@open.ac.uk>

tools.name: Lint File
tools.description: Lint PHP file for syntax and style issues

tools.name: Detect Deviations
tools.description: Detect deviations from PHP best practices (naming, style, security)

tools.name: Analyze File
tools.description: Comprehensive analysis of PHP file (syntax, style, deviations)

tools.name: Check Snippet
tools.description: Check a PHP code snippet for lint issues
